definitions: Gary Noesner is a former chief negotiator for the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI).
Gary Noesner is known for his work in crisis negotiation and hostage situations.
Gary Noesner is the author of 'Stalling for Time: My Life as an FBI Hostage Negotiator'.
examples: The book by Gary Noesner is highly regarded.
Gary Noesner spoke at the conference.
